completed_this_session: #40 [H1] first ingestion slice — Hamburg geometry (statistische Gebiete/Stadtteile/Bezirke), ADR-0014 Pillar 4 'geometry first'. Real WFS endpoints probed and verified live (geodienste.hamburg.de; discovered the outputFormat=application/geo+json quirk vs Berlin's application/json). ingestion/hamburg/geo/ingest_hamburg_geo.py ingested 945+104+7 real features into data/raw/hamburg/geo/*.parquet. stg_hamburg_geo staging view + dim_area/dim_city wiring (dim_city gains native_crs_epsg: BER=25833, HH=25832). Not methodology-bearing (pure dimension/geometry plumbing) — no gate required. Full build green. Merged into develop at 0c2e453. Issue #40 stays OPEN / card stays In Progress — only 1 of 5 ADR-0014 pillars done; remaining pillars (Sozialmonitoring outcome, EWR-equivalent predictors, displacement zones, rent) documented as follow-up in a progress comment on #40 rather than split into sub-issues (avoiding backlog noise).

integrated_into_develop.title: [H1] Hamburg geometry ingestion (Pillar 4 of ADR-0014, partial)
integrated_into_develop.note: ingestion/hamburg/geo/ingest_hamburg_geo.py, stg_hamburg_geo, dim_area union, seed_dim_city.native_crs_epsg, seed_dim_area_level district/subarea_l1/subarea_l2. Verified against live Hamburg WFS (not just desk research).

in_progress.title: [H1] Onboard a second city via adapters
in_progress.note: ADR-0014 done. Geometry ingestion (Pillar 4) done and integrated. Next slices in order: (1) OSM POI reuse (Pillar 1, low risk, Epic C ohsome ingestion unchanged except polygons); (2) Sozialmonitoring outcome adapter (Pillar 2, ingestion/hamburg/sozialmonitoring/, PDF reconciliation gate mirrors ADR-0006); (3) EWR-equivalent predictors (Pillar 3, methodology-bearing two-grain reconciliation needs geo-DS+domain sign-off); (4) displacement+rent (Pillar 5). Progress tracked via comments on #40, not sub-issues.

board_status.note: 1 In Progress (#40 H1). 0 closed-but-not-Done drift (reconciliation pass clean at start and end of session). Todo top-of-queue is all blocked-on-maintainer (#33, #70, #82) plus O4-remainder (#83, gated on #33) and deferred #80.

open_conditions_carried_forward: #65 E1/E2: H3b divergence + H3c opposite direction deferred to G2 methodology page.
R-A8 PASS WITH CONDITIONS: conditions to spatial-methods.md and G2.
E3 geo-DS C2 (non-blocking): C5 note for D3 dynamism maps/narratives (before G2).
spatial-methods.md domain C1: Gi* = amenity-change hotspot label in G2.
R-A9 geo-DS: ewr_composite for lor_2021 when EWR join extended; LISA FDR note for G2.
R-A9 domain: HL LISA label nuance; diffusion causal limits; D5 missing (Epic D).
#115 EWR H2/H3: POI pseudo-replication caveat (35% PLRs share poi_count). p-values inflated. For G2.

#117 B7 geo-DS C-1..C-4 + domain D-1..D-5: MSS H3a/H3b = co-movement only; pre-2021 H3 single-pair caveat; ewr_composite not cross-vintage comparable; C5 attenuation note; migration 2017 break; uninhabited count per edition.
#119 B9 geo-DS C-1/C-2/C-3 + domain D-1/D-2/D-3: partial composite std ~10% higher; no foreigners/migration claims pre-2014; E1 must filter any_endpoint_partial=FALSE; public label required.

ADR-0014 open questions (Hamburg): exact WFS feature-type/CSV schemas — RESOLVED for geometry (app:statistische_gebiete, app:stadtteile, app:bezirke, all confirmed live); still open for Sozialmonitoring/EWR/displacement/rent pillars; 943→941 statistische-Gebiete crosswalk (ingested 'current' vintage only, 945 features, crosswalk deferred); Wohndauer fine-grain availability (hands-on probe, no paid fallback if absent); Soziale-Erhaltungsverordnung in-force-date attribute; two-grain social-pillar reconciliation is methodology-bearing — needs geo-DS+domain sign-off when H1's Pillar-3 models are built.
next_session_decision: Continue #40 [H1]: next slice is either (a) OSM POI reuse for Hamburg (Pillar 1, lowest risk, reuses Epic C ohsome ingestion unchanged except for the new Hamburg polygons from stg_hamburg_geo) or (b) the Sozialmonitoring outcome adapter (Pillar 2, ingestion/hamburg/sozialmonitoring/, mirrors ingestion/berlin/mss/). Either is a coherent next increment. All other Todo items remain blocked on maintainer (#33/#70/#82) — H1 is the only unblocked substantive work until one of those clears.
